description: CERB3RE Reims Metal Fest : a new event in Champagne's heart.
errorText: Your browser doesn't support HTML5 videos.
mainText:
CERB3RE Reims Metal Fest : a new event in Champagne's heart !

Prepare yourself to live 3 days full of Metal music with the CERB3RE Reims Metal Fest !
An event growing on a bold triptych : 
3 days, 3 places, and above all, 3 reasons to celebrate our Arts of living !

The CERB3RE Reims Metal Fest isn't only a festival, it's also a dynamic of support and collaboration with our ecosystem's agents.
Since 2018, this desire to create a fest not like others on Reims's lands was running in our heads : Reims deserves a yearly event dedicated to our esthetic's wealth.
Our ambition ? Open the doors of this culture often unknown, making it accessible to everyone, even families.

Ready to rock ? 
The Lez Arts Aki team is waiting to write with you a new chapter of our adventure.

firstDate.title: Day 1 : Friday December 5th
firstDate.text:
Get ready to experience 3 days of intense Metal, fellas ! 

We wanted this first evening to be just like the very first date organized by the association: intimate and electric. 

By choosing Le Lieu as the opening scene, the proximity of the artists to the public will be the key word. 

On the program: Inward (Deathcore / Modern Metal), Death Awaits (Death / Thrash Metal) and Survival Zero (Metal)
firstDate.altPoster: Poster of the first date of Cerb3re 2025 edition, our metal music festival.

secondDate.title: Day 2 : Saturday December 6th
secondDate.text:
You're conveyed by Lez Arts Aki to La Cartonnerie, Saturday the 6th of December 2025, with a poster as electric as crazy!

Is programmed : Les Tambours du Bronx (Industrial Metal), Benighted (Brutal Death Metal), Knuckle Head (Dark Country / Stoner Rock), Akiavel (Death Metal) and Northern Lights (Newcore).

1 place, 5 groups, and even more will to meet you in the Pit !
secondDate.altPoster: Poster of the second date of Cerb3re 2025 edition, our metal music festival.

thirdDate.title: Day 3 : Sunday December 7th
thirdDate.text:
CERB3RE Reims Metal Fest isn't just a festival; it's also an opportunity to promote the often overlooked metal genre, making it accessible to everyone!

We've designed this Sunday event for youngers and olders.

The planning : a photo exhibit presented by Camille Brulé, a lecture led by Corentin Charbonnier on this genre, which we've elevated to the status of an art form, and a Metal For Kids preformance for young audiences.

A friendly time for sharing, exchanging, and sharing our values!

Let's all experience it together, friends!
thirdDate.altPoster: Poster of the third date of Cerb3re 2025 edition, our metal music festival.
